criteria.name: Uses class diagram syntax
criteria.description: Uses Mermaid classDiagram syntax rather than an ER diagram or flowchart.

criteria.name: Models all requested classes
criteria.description: Includes Skill, ReferenceFile, EvalScenario, HarnessAdapter, and Package as classes or clearly equivalent class names.

criteria.name: Shows required relationships
criteria.description: Represents Skill-to-ReferenceFile as one-to-many loading, EvalScenario-to-Skill as exactly one tested skill, HarnessAdapter-to-Skill as exposure, and Package ownership of one Skill plus many HarnessAdapters.

criteria.name: Includes useful class details
criteria.description: Includes concise attributes such as name, description, path, platform, or id without inventing excessive fields.

criteria.name: Assumptions note
criteria.description: Includes one brief assumptions sentence outside the diagram.
